text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower was desperate to visit a shrine, so
here we are.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Thank you for doing this for me, Big Brother.
choice_data_list: Why did you want to come here so badly?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Thank you for doing this for me, Big Sister.
choice_data_list: Why did you want to come here so badly?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Well, I want to go lots of places with you...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Well, I want to go lots of places with you...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
But I don't want you to get mixed up in my bad
luck.
choice_data_list: So we're gonna pray that nothing happens?
So we're gonna pray that nothing happens?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
But I don't want you to get mixed up in my bad
luck.
choice_data_list: So we're gonna pray that nothing happens?
So we're gonna pray that nothing happens?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Y-yeah... I thought if we prayed together, the
gods would definitely listen.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Y-yeah... I thought if we prayed together, the
gods would definitely listen.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: So, will you?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Okay! Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Okay! Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But, as we're praying...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Crash!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hyaaa!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Part of the old roof falls off.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Ohhh, it's just like I thought.
choice_data_list: Good thing it didn't hit us.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
But... if I wasn't here, this definitely wouldn't have
happened...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I should've known. I'm just—
choice_data_list: We're safe thanks to your prayer.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: My prayer?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
So you're saying... that wasn't bad luck just now...
but good luck?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Th-that would mean... the gods were listening?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
It must be because you prayed with me... It feels
like a weight has been lifted from me!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
It must be because you prayed with me... It feels
like a weight has been lifted from me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her prayers answered, Rice Shower beams with
joy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Part of the old roof falls off.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh no... This is all my fault!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The moment I try to run after her, I stumble over
a gutter in the stone path.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Big Brother! Are you okay? I'm sorry... This is all
my fault.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Big Sister! Are you okay? I'm sorry... This is all my
fault.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No matter how many times I try to reassure her,
she won't stop beating herself up about what
happened.
